{{Short description|Hospitality vertical of Matthews Real Estate Investment Services}}
{{AfC submission|||ts=20260510000000|u=NateSolomon|ns=118}}
{{Infobox company
| name             = Matthews Hotel Markets
| former_name      = Matthews Hotel Team
| logo             =
| type             = Subsidiary
| industry         = [[Hospitality industry|Hospitality]] [[commercial real estate]]
| founded          = {{Start date and age|2024}}
| hq_location_city = [[Austin, Texas|Austin]], [[Texas]]
| hq_location_country = United States
| num_locations    = 2 (Austin, [[Denver]])
| services         = Hotel investment sales, hospitality capital markets, hotel acquisition advisory
| parent           = [[Matthews Real Estate Investment Services]]
| website          = {{URL|matthewshotelmarkets.com}}
}}

'''Matthews Hotel Markets''' (also styled the '''Matthews Hotel Team''') is the [[hospitality industry|hospitality]] [[commercial real estate]] vertical of [[Matthews Real Estate Investment Services]], an American commercial real estate investment services firm. Headquartered in [[Austin, Texas]], with an additional office in [[Denver]], the team focuses on hotel [[investment sales]], hospitality [[capital market|capital markets]] advisory, and hotel acquisition advisory across the U.S. lodging sector.<ref name="globest-tl">{{cite web|title=Matthews Real Estate Investment Services|url=https://www.globest.com/thought-leaders/matthews-real-estate-investment-services/|website=GlobeSt|access-date=2026-05-10}}</ref>

The vertical operates within the broader Matthews Capital Markets platform and is distinct from the unrelated developer Matthews Southwest Hospitality.

== History ==

[[Matthews Real Estate Investment Services]] was founded in April 2015 in [[El Segundo, California]] by Kyle Matthews and relocated its corporate headquarters to [[Nashville, Tennessee]] in 2022.<ref name="labj-hq">{{cite news|title=Matthews Moves HQ from El Segundo to Nashville|url=https://labusinessjournal.com/real-estate/matthews-moves-hq-from-el-segundo-to-nashville/|work=Los Angeles Business Journal|date=2022}}</ref><ref name="trd-hq">{{cite news|title=Matthews Real Estate relocates HQ to Nashville|url=https://therealdeal.com/la/2022/07/12/matthews-real-estate-relocates-hq-to-nashville/|work=The Real Deal|date=2022-07-12}}</ref> The hospitality vertical was launched in 2024 from the firm's [[Austin, Texas|Austin]] office to provide a dedicated hotel investment sales and capital markets platform within the firm.<ref name="globest-tl" />

== Operations ==

Matthews Hotel Markets operates from Austin, Texas, with a satellite presence in [[Denver]] focused on Mountain West hospitality. The team is structured around three service lines:

* Hotel investment sales (disposition advisory for hotel owners and sponsors)
* Hospitality capital markets (debt and equity placement, including senior, mezzanine, bridge, and [[commercial mortgage-backed security]] executions)
* Hotel acquisition advisory (buy-side mandates for institutional investors, family offices, and developers)

Coverage spans U.S. lodging chain scales from select-service brands such as [[Hampton by Hilton|Hampton Inn]], [[Holiday Inn Express]], and [[Courtyard by Marriott]] through full-service, resort, lifestyle, boutique, and extended-stay properties.<ref name="globest-tl" /> Quarterly hospitality market reports are published for major U.S. submarkets including [[Texas]] and the [[Sun Belt]].<ref name="connectcre-hosp">{{cite web|title=Hospitality (category)|url=https://www.connectcre.com/hospitality/|website=Connect CRE|access-date=2026-05-10}}</ref>

== Notable transactions ==

Independent secondary coverage of specific Matthews Hotel Markets transactions was limited at the time of article submission; transaction-level coverage is published periodically in trade publications including ''[[Bisnow]]'', ''[[GlobeSt]]'', ''Connect CRE'', and ''REBusinessOnline''.<ref name="bisnow-tag">{{cite web|title=Matthews Real Estate Investment Services|url=https://www.bisnow.com/tags/matthews-real-estate-investment-services|website=Bisnow|access-date=2026-05-10}}</ref><ref name="co-tag">{{cite web|title=Matthews Real Estate Investment Services|url=https://commercialobserver.com/company/matthews-real-estate-investment-services/|website=Commercial Observer|access-date=2026-05-10}}</ref>

== See also ==

* [[Hotel investment]]
* [[Hospitality industry]]
* [[Matthews Real Estate Investment Services]]
* [[Real estate broker]]

== References ==

{{reflist}}

== External links ==

* {{Official website|https://matthewshotelmarkets.com}}

[[Category:Real estate services companies of the United States]]
[[Category:Companies based in Austin, Texas]]
[[Category:Hospitality companies of the United States]]
[[Category:Companies established in 2024]]
